title: Fit Criteria Schema
description: Schema for fit criteria that define testable acceptance conditions organized by category (functional, non-functional, security/compliance)

functional.description: Functional fit criteria - specific behaviors the system must exhibit

verified.description: Whether this criterion has been verified/checked

verificationMethod.description: How this criterion will be verified. Recommended values: test, inspection, demonstration, analysis — or any domain-appropriate value

nonFunctional.description: Non-functional fit criteria - performance, scalability, reliability targets

category.description: NFR category. Recommended values: performance, scalability, reliability, availability, maintainability, usability, compatibility, observability, portability — or any domain-appropriate category

criterion.description: The testable criterion statement with specific metrics

verificationMethod.description: How this criterion will be verified. Recommended values: benchmark, load-test, stress-test, monitoring, inspection, test, analysis — or any appropriate method

category.description: Security category. Recommended values: authentication, authorization, encryption, audit, compliance, data-protection, network-security, secrets-management, certificate-management, vulnerability-scanning, container-security, access-control, identity-management, supply-chain-security — or any domain-appropriate category

verificationMethod.description: How this security criterion will be verified. Recommended values: security-audit, penetration-test, code-review, compliance-review, inspection, test, automated-scan — or any appropriate method
